title: Title
doc_html:
PART VI.  MILITARY SERVICE RELIEF ACT

SUBPART A.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§401.  Title

This Part may be cited as the "Military Service Relief Act".  

Acts 1991, 1st E.S., No. 6, §1, eff. April 17, 1991.
